libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No extra environment variables or system properties are required for normal pekko-actor coverage. Generate tests against APIs present in org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; do not try to preserve org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor, TypedActorExtension, or TypedProps tests because those classes are absent from the 2.0.0-M1 artifact. If optional DNS-internals coverage is retained, keep the existing --add-exports=java.base/sun.net.dns=ALL-UNNAMED JVM/native-image argument, but that is not prerequisite setup for meaningful actor coverage.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The newer typed actor API is documented under the separate pekko-actor-typed_2.13 module; adding it would broaden the test to another artifact rather than fix pekko-actor coverage.

Pekko docs recommend pekko-testkit or pekko-actor-testkit-typed for application-style testing, but basic ActorSystem, Props, dispatcher, reflection, and serialization coverage can be exercised without an extra testkit dependency.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No required extra setup found; the failure is from removed deprecated TypedActor APIs, not missing dependencies, Docker, or environment configuration.
